TextENGNew: ``...Huh?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3060. Then you're taking the exam for Rikuo University too, Tamako?``
``Yeah.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3022. ...I mean, don't the kids from this area usually take the exam?@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3023. Even if they're not planning to enroll.``
I get it. Unlike the metropolitan area and the Kansai area, it's a great place to get used to taking entrance exams, isn't it?
``Well then, is that so?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3062. Then I guess the backup location for you and everyone else is actually my first choice~.``

``Don't say such strange things.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3025. After all, if I do receive an invitation to Rikuo University, I'll accept it.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3026. It's not very far from here. I'm not interested in traveling to a remote college anyway.``
``...Is that so?``
It was a bit surprising. Rikuo University is hardly a bad college, but Tamako is the top of our class, so I would've expected her to aim a little higher.
Of course, Tamako probably feels obligated to look after her younger brothers, and her parents can't offer much in the way of financial assistance, but I'm sure they would be kind enough to help.
``For the longest time, I've wanted to be a teacher.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3028. So, the college I choose doesn't make much of a difference if I want to be a teacher, right?``
``Rikuo University is nearby, and their Department of Education is likely to be challenging, so it would be a perfect college environment.``

``...You say that, but wouldn't you have an easier time advancing your career at a better university?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3065. And teaching is not a well appreciated job.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3066. You'll have no title so you'll have to bow to a lot of superiors. And I think their average annual salary is declining too~.``

``Mmm~, well, that may be partially true.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3031. But I'm not interested in career advancement like Ogata-sensei. I'd like to be more like Yasukawa-sensei, where students feel comfortable talking to me about anything.``
``Because I absolutely hate the idea of relying on others.``
``...Wow, seeing the class president's determination brings a tear my to eye~.``
Though I said that to poke fun at her... I really did believe that Tamako was a perfect fit for teaching.
A desire to take care of others, and to guide them with your wisdom... those instincts are what a student needs most in a teacher.
Well, that's a skill I couldn't develop no matter how hard I tried.
``...What about you, Chisato?@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3034. Since you're aiming for Rikuo University, I assume you have some major goal?``
``But of course!@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3069. My goal is total world domination...@k@|@y@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3070. Eek?!``
``...I gave you a serious answer, I need you to do the same.``
``Okaaay, it's a little embarrassing though.``
...No, it was actually a pretty pathetic reason. ...But I couldn't lie to Tamako, so I warily told her.
``...Well... it would put me closer to that girl, wouldn't it?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3073. That college, I mean...``
``Closer?@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3037. ...Oh...``
Thanks to our years of friendship, Tamako was able to understand what I was getting at.
Right. ...Because she knew about that girl.
``I don't have a lot of ambition about what school I want to go to.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3075. I'm the hospital director's daughter, so my future is already somewhat set in stone.``
``Well, I don't really have the brains for medical school, but I can at least enroll in the Pharmaceutical Department and work toward becoming a licensed pharmacist, right?``
My parents have no heir other than me.
And I don't have the skills to successfully manage a hospital. Of course, it would be natural for me to marry someone who works at a hospital.
``Once I graduate from college and get a job, I'll be too busy to visit her, won't I?@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3078. ...That's why I'd like to stay near that girl for the next four years.``
``Chisato...``
...It sounded ridiculous.
It was totally selfish. Wanting to see that girl every day sounded like nothing but trouble.
Even so, I...
``...Aah, that's enough!@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3080. I didn't want to say anything because it's such a depressing story~!@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3081. Do you at least feel sorry, Tamakooo?``
``......@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3040.You're always like this.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3041. When will you be able to move on?``
I couldn't understand what I just heard.
At least for now, I understood that I was doing this for that girl's sake, not just my own.
``...Actually, I want to know that too.@k@vS20/37/VTT_chisa3084. When and how will I be able to let go of this heavy baggage?``
``It's not easy.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3043. You, yourself, need to be the one to stop shouldering that burden.@k@vS20/38/VTT_tama3044. ...Don't you agree?``
``...And I can't do it. That's why I'm struggling.``
Tamako sighed and then looked back to me.
Aah... I understood what she was saying. I've sunk into a trap, running around in circles mentally.
Really... this is, like usual, just who I am.
